text_template: The all new Whoop is here. Now more advanced than ever. Train smarter. Sleep deeper. Recover faster. Extend your healthy years. Understand your cycle phases. Now 7% smaller with 14 plus days of battery life. So your data never stops, and neither do you. Power your best performance with memberships made for every goal. Join Whoop today.
